## Summary

Describe the improvement you are proposing.

## Current Behavior

What is happening today? Include screenshots or references.

## Desired Behavior

Explain the adjustment you would like to see.

## Business / User Value

Who benefits and how?

## Acceptance Criteria

* [ ] <c1>
* [ ] <c2>
* [ ] <c3>

## Risks / Considerations

List dependencies, trade-offs, or potential side effects.

## Additional Context

Add supporting documentation, mockups, or related issues.
